sections.name: Oratio
lines: May the brotherly crown of Your Martyrs, O Lord, give us joy and may it afford to our faith an increase of virtues and console us with many prayers.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: May we perform with pious mind the sacramental rites, O Lord, in honor of the holy Martyrs, and by them, may both protection and joy increase for us.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, almighty God, that we may follow more and more the faith of those whose memory we venerate in receiving Your sacrament.
